case_title: GUO LIANG CHEN VS. CHERYL JOW

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, GUO LIANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOW, CHERYL $265.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $295.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JOW, CHERYL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM EVYN SHOMER FILED BY CHEN, GUO LIANG JOW, CHERYL
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT JOW, CHERYL ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $328.00 FILED BY CHEN, GUO LIANG AS TO DEFENDANT JOW, CHERYL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0) SERVED OCT-10-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOW, CHERYL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: EVYN SHOMER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. AMY HUI INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
